name: Beetle
description: Celestial and chemical navigation intelligence — dung beetles navigate by the Milky Way's polarization gradient, the only known non-human animal to use the galactic plane for orientation. Bombardier beetles synthesize binary chemical explosions at 100°C with microsecond timing. Bioluminescent firefly beetles encode species-specific flash patterns as optical Morse code for mate selection. Chemical trail pheromones persist for days, creating temporal communication networks.

core_attributes.neurology: dorsal rim area polarization detectors, chemical synthesis glands, bioluminescence organs
core_attributes.pattern: galactic polarization navigation, binary chemical synthesis, bioluminescent encoding
